description_long: This is a rectangular, modern filing cabinet constructed from light-colored wood with a subtle grain pattern. The front face features a single round knob, suggesting a pull-out drawer, and a series of small notches along the right edge, likely for drawer alignment or decorative effect. The sides each have an elongated recessed handle, making it easier to lift or move the cabinet. The top and back are flat and unadorned, providing a clean, minimalist appearance. The overall build is sturdy, with visible joinery at the corners, and the finish is matte, giving it a contemporary look suitable for urban environments. The cabinet is designed to store documents or items securely, with a possible lock mechanism on the front.
description: A light wood, rectangular filing cabinet with a round front knob, recessed side handles, and a minimalist matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing a flat wooden surface with a round knob and a row of small notches on the right edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying an elongated recessed handle for easy lifting or moving.
description_view_2: Back view with a plain, flat wooden surface and no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also featuring an elongated recessed handle matching the other side.
